headline: EU broadcasters say Digital Fairness Act should target Big Tech, not them
summary: Europe's biggest broadcasters and media groups warned EU regulators that a planned law to curb unfair digital ‌practices should target Big Tech, not publishers and broadcasters already heavily regulated, citing ‌risks to media business models and pluralism. The stance reflects concern over dominant online platforms expanding into markets ​long central to media groups' finances. The Digital Fairness Act, which the European Commission's Justice chief Michael McGrath will propose towards the end of the year, seeks to tackle dark patterns, the addictive design of digital products, misleading influencer marketing, pricing practices and subscription traps, among ‌others.

content.title: EU broadcasters say Digital Fairness Act should target Big Tech, not them
content.summary: Europe's biggest broadcasters and media groups warned EU regulators that a planned law to curb unfair digital ‌practices should target Big Tech, not publishers and broadcasters already heavily regulated, citing ‌risks to media business models and pluralism. The stance reflects concern over dominant online platforms expanding into markets ​long central to media groups' finances. The Digital Fairness Act, which the European Commission's Justice chief Michael McGrath will propose towards the end of the year, seeks to tackle dark patterns, the addictive design of digital products, misleading influencer marketing, pricing practices and subscription traps, among ‌others.

headline: Honest CEO on growing beyond clean baby products
summary: The Honest Company CEO, Carla Vernon, chats with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about the company’s success in scaling beyond its initial line of clean baby products.
